partitions.selection_rule: Assign 70 percent of the governed ranking-input genes to the training partition with a fixed seed after cutoff filtering.
partitions.leakage_rule: Train rows may only depend on pre-cutoff ranking inputs and must not expose held-out evaluation labels.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign 15 percent of the governed ranking-input genes to validation after the train partition is fixed.
partitions.leakage_rule: Validation rows may tune model hyperparameters but must not see evaluation targets outside the validation partition.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign the remaining 15 percent of the governed ranking-input genes to the held-out test partition.
partitions.leakage_rule: Test rows remain fully held out until scoring time and must never leak into feature construction or threshold selection.

description: Example split manifest that fixes a deterministic gene-level split strategy before any task-specific frozen rescue dataset ships.
notes: Later rescue-data PRs should replace the example status with active split assignments while keeping the same freeze linkage and leakage rules.
